subcodes.first_line: We awoke beneath the shade of providence and tender mercies, and betook Ourselves unto another station. Upon Our arrival, We revealed the verses with manifest sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اصبحنا فی ظل العنایه و الالطاف و قصدنا مقاما آخر و لما وردنا انزلنا الآیات بسلطان مبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for nearness to God, @knowledge; recognition of God
